Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Voice of Solstice]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — The Voice of Solstice is a representative of the highest leadership in Solstice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — The Voice of Solstice is a faceless silhouette used to communicate for Solstice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 22''' — The Voice of Solstice is a humanoid shadow lit from behind like an eclipsed moon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 22''' — The Voice claims their magic is superior to Captain Vallenar's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — The Voice of Solstice appears as a dark human silhouette outlined by golden light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — The Voice of Solstice has an androgynous voice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — The Voice has a blank face that can split open into a smile and release reddish light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 38''' — The Voice of Solstice takes the first position in the ritual.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 38''' — The Voice of Solstice uses a staff that may be wood or bone, topped by a grasping hand holding a burning ring of fire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 38''' — The Voice of Solstice uses a staff.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — The Voice of Solstice is a representative of Solstice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — The Voice of Solstice wears a mask.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — The Voice of Solstice is a tall, faceless creature with an orb of darkness for a head outlined in reddish-orange flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — The Voice of Solstice is approximately twelve feet tall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — The Voice of Solstice is a summoned beast rather than a person.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
